summary: Build passing, lint clean, 24/24 tests passing. Added concept starring/shortlist, brief history persistence, image model persistence, and fixed extractJson crash vulnerability. UX now supports starring concepts, copying/exporting only starred ones, reloading past briefs from history, and remembering the selected image model across sessions.
currentFocus: End-to-end generation validation with real BYOP user key still pending. All infrastructure, UI, UX features, tests, and dev-mode mocks are ready. App is functionally complete for deploy readiness pending live validation.
nextTasks: Validate end-to-end generation with real BYOP user key (blocker)
Create GitHub repo and connect to Vercel
Final QA pass once real key validates
blockers: Need real Pollinations user key to fully validate generation end-to-end. Mock mode provides safe dev testing but does not replace live API quality validation.
knownLimitations: Image quality depends on user's Pollinations key budget and prompt scaffolding.
Face expression control via text-to-image is approximate.
No channel brand memory or persistent user accounts.
Concept regeneration replaces a single concept from a fresh 6-pack; exact targeting not guaranteed.
End-to-end generation quality not yet validated with real Pollinations user key.
Mock mode produces tone-aware placeholder concepts for safe dev testing but does not exercise live LLM quality.
